title: BitNet-TT session 11: speed recovery (+2.34 t/s via cheaper argmax readout)

stories.title: Profile + replace uint32 argmax readout
stories.notes: DONE. Microbench: cpu().to_list() 0.047 ms/call vs to_layout+typecast+to_torch 0.282 ms/call (5.5× cheaper). Applied to _sample_token trace-embedded argmax path. End-to-end decode 71.05 -> 73.39 t/s (+2.34 t/s, +3.3%). PCC unchanged within noise. Commit e5e1cd4. MEMO.md baseline updated.
